title: Navigation History, Back Semantics, Snapshots, and Failure Recovery · Language Lens: Pokedex Go State Snapshot
summary: Back recomputes offsets instead of restoring observed state, failed requests corrupt history, repeated pages grow memory forever, and concurrent prefetch mutates the visible cursor. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go state snapshot increment in bounded snapshot navigation history. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
